message:
♻️ refactor(phase4.5b): migrate /api/mcp hook reads to kc-agent (#7993) (#8173)

Phase 4.5b of the pod-SA -> kc-agent refactor: migrate the remaining
frontend /api/mcp/* read callers that live in mcp hooks, lib utilities,
and page components to kc-agent at LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL. Like Phase
4.5a (cards), this is a pure frontend URL swap — no backend handler is
deleted in this PR.

52 call sites across 16 files:

  web/src/hooks/mcp/compute.ts         (5)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/config.ts          (5)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/events.ts          (2)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/namespaces.ts      (2)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/networking.ts      (3)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/security.ts        (1)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/shared.ts          (5)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/storage.ts         (6)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/workloads.ts       (12)
  web/src/hooks/mcp/clusters.ts        (1)
  web/src/hooks/useCachedData.ts       (4)
  web/src/lib/sseClient.ts             (1)
  web/src/lib/runbooks/executor.ts     (2)  (comment-only references; other
                                             callers via MCP ops-tools POST stay
                                             on backend for Phase 4.5c review)
  web/src/components/namespaces/NamespaceManager.tsx  (1)
  web/src/components/logs/Logs.tsx                    (1)  (comment-only)
  web/src/config/cards/pod-logs.ts                    (1)  (comment-only)

Same pattern as Phase 4.5a: '/api/mcp/X' or `/api/mcp/X?${params}`
become `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/X` or `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/X?${params}`.
Files that already imported from lib/constants/network had
LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL folded into the existing destructure. Files where
only comment-string references were swept now have the import removed
(the fetch calls there still target the backend — the comment prose
was just describing an endpoint the user visits separately).

NOT migrated in this PR (deliberate):
  - web/src/lib/widgets/widgetRegistry.ts — the 26 '/api/mcp/*'
    references are a configuration map of endpoint strings, shown to
    operators in widget docs. Swapping them to kc-agent would change
    user-visible metadata, not runtime behaviour.
  - web/src/components/drilldown/RemediationConsole.tsx — uses POST
    /api/mcp/tools/ops/call (MCP ops-tools, not a read). Phase 4.5c
    will review per-tool.

Refs #7993.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
  * Pod Logs Card Configuration
  *
  * Renders container logs via a custom component (PodLogs.tsx) that wires
- * cluster/namespace/pod/container selectors to the `/api/mcp/pods/logs`
+ * cluster/namespace/pod/container selectors to the `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/pods/logs`
  * endpoint through the `usePodLogs` hook.
  */

@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ import { registerRefetch } from '../../lib/modeTransition'

 import { subscribePolling } from './pollingManager'
-import { MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../lib/constants/network'
+import { MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS, LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL } from '../../lib/constants/network'
 import type { ClusterEvent } from './types'

@@ -154,7 +154,7 @@ export function useEvents(cluster?: string, namespace?: string, limit = 20) {

       const allEvents = await fetchSSE<ClusterEvent>({
-        url: '/api/mcp/events/stream',
+        url: `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/events/stream`,
         params: sseParams,
         itemsKey: 'events',
         signal,
@@ -335,7 +335,7 @@ export function useWarningEvents(cluster?: string, namespace?: string, limit = 2

       const allEvents = await fetchSSE<ClusterEvent>({
-        url: '/api/mcp/events/warnings/stream',
+        url: `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/events/warnings/stream`,
         params: sseParams,
         itemsKey: 'events',
         signal,

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ import { registerRefetch, registerCacheReset } from '../../lib/modeTransition'

 import { MIN_REFRESH_INDICATOR_MS, REFRESH_INTERVAL_MS, getEffectiveInterval } from './shared'
 import { subscribePolling } from './pollingManager'
-import { MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../lib/constants/network'
+import { MCP_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS, LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL } from '../../lib/constants/network'
 import type { SecurityIssue, GitOpsDrift } from './types'
 
 // LocalStorage cache keys
@@ -98,7 +98,7 @@ export function useSecurityIssues(cluster?: string, namespace?: string) {
       if (namespace) sseParams.namespace = namespace
 
       const allIssues = await fetchSSE<SecurityIssue>({
-        url: '/api/mcp/security-issues/stream',
+        url: `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/security-issues/stream`,
         params: sseParams,
         itemsKey: 'issues',
         onClusterData: (_clusterName, items) => {

@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ function resolveArgs(args: Record<string, string>, context: RunbookContext): Rec
 /**
  * Execute a single evidence step via MCP or Gadget API.
  *
- * #7285 — Fixed MCP route from `/api/mcp/ops/call` to `/api/mcp/tools/ops/call`
+ * #7285 — Fixed MCP route from `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/ops/call` to `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/tools/ops/call`
  * to match the backend route registered in server.go.
  *
  * #7286 — Fixed MCP payload schema from `{ tool, args }` to `{ name, arguments }`

@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
 import { STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN } from './constants'
 
 export interface SSEFetchOptions<T> {
-  /** SSE endpoint URL path (e.g. '/api/mcp/pods/stream') */
+  /** SSE endpoint URL path (e.g. `${LOCAL_AGENT_HTTP_URL}/pods/stream`) */
   url: string
   /** Query parameters appended to the URL */
   params?: Record<string, string | number | undefined>
